title: Amend a redundancy claim
text:
Use these forms to update or amend information in your claim for redundancy.

You’ll need your:

redundancy claim reference number (this begins with LN)

National Insurance number

Contact the insolvency practitioner handling your employer’s insolvency if:

you are not sure about the information you need to provide

you’re making changes to any details in your claim

They may also need to change the information they provided to us.

Unpaid wages

We need to know about any wages and other money you were owed by your employer, up to your last official date of working.

Use our online service to 
amend details about your unpaid wages
.

If you cannot use the online service, 
complete a paper form
 and return it using 
our general enquiry form
. 
It may take us longer to process forms received this way.

Find out more about 
how we calculate your unpaid wages (arrears of pay)
.

Holiday pay accrued

We need to know about the number of holiday days you were entitled to. It’s important these details are correct or we cannot pay you.

Use our online service to 
amend details about your accrued holiday pay
.

You’ll need details of your:

holiday leave year start

number of days you were entitled to take during your whole leave year

number of days you took between the start of your leave year and the date you were made redundant

number of days you carried over from your last leave year allowance

If you cannot use the online service, 
complete a paper form
 and return it using 
our general enquiry form
. It may take us longer to process forms received this way.

Find out more about 
how we calculate your holiday pay accrued
.

Holiday taken but not paid

We need to know about the holiday days you took but were not paid for. It’s important these details are correct or we cannot pay you.

Use our online service to 
amend details about your holiday taken but not paid
.

You’ll need details of your:

holiday leave year start

number of days you were entitled to take during your whole leave year

dates you took holidays but did not receive pay for

If you cannot use the online service, 
complete a paper form
 and return it using 
our general enquiry form
. It may take us longer to process forms received this way.

Find out more about 
how we calculate your holiday pay taken but not paid
.

Your employment details

We need to know the exact information found in your employment contract and on your payslips. It’s important these details are correct or we cannot pay you.

Use our online service to 
amend the following details about your employment:

your gross weekly pay

employment start and end date

the date your notice was given

These are the only details you can update, which we use to calculate your claim.

If you cannot use the online service, 
complete a paper form
 and return it using 
our general enquiry form
. It may take us longer to process forms received this way.

Your personal details

We need to know the exact information found in your personal documents and on your payslips. It’s important these details are correct or we cannot pay you.

Use our online service to 
amend the following details about your:

name

National Insurance number

date of birth

email address

home address

mobile number

If you cannot use the online service, 
complete a paper form
 and return it using 
our general enquiry form
. It may take us longer to process forms received this way.

Your bank details

Complete the bank details amendment form
 and return it to us using 
our general enquiry form
.
description: Correct a mistake or update information you provided in your online claim for redundancy.
